evidence_summary: Establish the protagonist's cognitive transition from a physical combatant to an intellectual observer capable of decoding Martian linguistics. The scene relies on auditory immersion and tight visual focus to convey his internal processing of ambient dialogue.
Having mastered enough of the Martian language through persistent study, the protagonist remains quiet in the communal sleeping quarters, listening intently as the adults converse around him.
From isolation to a sense of growing awareness and intelligence.
